summary: Frontend testing for bank demo fixes on /mira-demo page. All 6 requested fixes verified working: 1) Reminders dropdown centered (0px offset), 2) History button opens Past Chats panel, 3) Soul questions work and show score update, 4) No weather in content area (only in header), 5) 'For Mojo' is centered (textAlign: center), 6) Suggestion cards use clean grid layout with 4 cards.
critical_code_review_comments: WelcomeHero.jsx line 106: hero-title has style={{ textAlign: 'center' }} - correctly centered
WelcomeHero.jsx line 139: Weather card explicitly REMOVED with comment - correct
WelcomeHero.jsx lines 142-149: Suggestion cards use CSS grid with repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr))
MiraTopBar.jsx: Reminders dropdown uses portal with translateX(-50%) for centering
mira-premium.css line 1318: Past Chats panel has right: 16px positioning
context_for_next_testing_agent: Browser automation crashes frequently - may need smaller scripts or fresh sessions. All 6 fixes verified working.

tested_flows.notes: Button center: 310px, Dropdown center: 310px, Offset: 0.0px - perfectly centered

tested_flows.flow: 2. History button opens Past Chats panel
tested_flows.notes: PastChatsPanel component renders with .mp-past-chats class. Panel found after clicking History button.
Soul modal shows 'Know Mojo Better' with 3 dynamic questions. After answering all 3, shows 'Soul Updated!' with new score. API endpoint /api/pet-soul/profile/{pet_id}/answers/bulk is called.

tested_flows.flow: 4. No weather card in content area
tested_flows.notes: 0 weather elements found in .mira-hero-welcome. Code comment confirms: 'Weather Card - REMOVED: Already shown in MiraTopBar header'
WelcomeHero.jsx line 106: textAlign: center. Verified via JS: window.getComputedStyle returns 'center'
4 suggestion cards found with data-testid='suggestion-0' through 'suggestion-3'. CSS: display: grid, gridTemplateColumns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr))
All 8 buttons found and clickable: picks-btn, history-btn, reminders-btn, insights-btn, soul-btn, learn-btn, concierge-btn, new-chat-btn
Learn button opens modal with 'Learn with Mojo' header, video categories (For You, Barking, Potty, etc.), and video thumbnails
Concierge button opens dropdown with WhatsApp, Chat, Email options
'For Mojo' remains centered on mobile. All UI elements accessible.
